# White Lightning Motors

> Performance golf cart motor upgrades and lithium battery conversions. Mail-in service nationwide from Texas. Built by Charlie Stout. 1-year warranty on every motor, free return shipping, 4–7 day turnaround.

Phone: 832-832-1993
Email: sales@whitelightningmotors.com

## Products
- [Golf Cart Motor Upgrades — EZGO, Club Car, Yamaha](https://whitelightningmotors.com/motor-upgrades/): High-output bolt-in golf cart motor upgrades from $325. EZGO, Club Car, Yamaha, ICON. 14 mph stock to 25+ mph with stock controller. 1-year warranty. Mail-in service.
- [EZGO Golf Cart Motor Upgrade — From $325](https://whitelightningmotors.com/motor-upgrades/ezgo/): High-output bolt-in motor upgrade for EZGO golf carts. Hit 25–28 mph on stock controller. Models supported: TXT, RXV, Marathon and more. 1-year warranty.
- [Club Car Golf Cart Motor Upgrade — From $325](https://whitelightningmotors.com/motor-upgrades/club-car/): High-output bolt-in motor upgrade for Club Car golf carts. Hit 25–27 mph on stock controller. Models supported: DS, Precedent, Onward and more. 1-year warranty.
- [Yamaha Golf Cart Motor Upgrade — From $325](https://whitelightningmotors.com/motor-upgrades/yamaha/): High-output bolt-in motor upgrade for Yamaha golf carts. Hit 23–26 mph on stock controller. Models supported: G19, G22, G29 Drive and more. 1-year warranty.
- [ICON Golf Cart Motor Upgrade — From $325](https://whitelightningmotors.com/motor-upgrades/icon/): High-output bolt-in motor upgrade for ICON golf carts. Hit 25–28 mph on stock controller. Models supported: i20, i40, i60 and more. 1-year warranty.
- [Lithium Golf Cart Battery Conversions](https://whitelightningmotors.com/lithium-batteries/): Lithium battery upgrades for EZGO, Club Car, Yamaha, ICON. 48V/72V Bolt Energy LiFePO4 packs with Bluetooth BMS. 250 lb weight savings, 2× range, 8+ year lifespan.
- [Navitas Golf Cart Controllers — DC TSX 400A & 600A](https://whitelightningmotors.com/controllers/): Navitas DC TSX programmable controllers for EZGO, Club Car, Yamaha. Bluetooth tuning, adjustable speed/regen/current limits. 400A and 600A models. Paired with motor upgrades.
- [Golf Cart AC Conversion Kits](https://whitelightningmotors.com/ac-conversion/): Full AC motor + controller conversion kits for EZGO, Club Car, Yamaha. Regenerative braking, near-silent operation, 30+ mph capable. Compare AC vs high-output DC with Charlie.

## Resources
- [Golf Cart Performance Blog](https://whitelightningmotors.com/blog/): Articles, comparisons, and how-tos for golf cart performance upgrades — top speed expectations, EZGO vs Club Car, lithium vs lead-acid, and more from Charlie at White Lightning Motors.
- [How fast will my golf cart go after a motor upgrade?](https://whitelightningmotors.com/blog/how-fast-will-my-golf-cart-go-after-a-motor-upgrade/): Real-world top speeds after a White Lightning motor upgrade by cart brand, battery condition, and controller. Plus what it takes to get to 30+ mph.
- [EZGO vs Club Car: which motor upgrade is better?](https://whitelightningmotors.com/blog/ezgo-vs-club-car-motor-upgrade/): Side-by-side comparison of EZGO TXT and Club Car DS/Precedent motor upgrades — what's different, what's the same, which is faster, and which one to buy if you're shopping for a cart.
- [Lithium vs lead-acid for golf carts: the honest comparison](https://whitelightningmotors.com/blog/lithium-vs-lead-acid-golf-cart/): When lithium is worth the upfront cost, when lead-acid is fine, and how to think about range, weight, lifespan, and total cost across both options.

## Company
- [How Our Mail-In Golf Cart Motor Service Works](https://whitelightningmotors.com/how-it-works/): Step-by-step: how to ship your golf cart motor to our Texas shop, what we do to it, and how fast it comes back. Free return shipping, 4–7 day turnaround, 1-year warranty.
- [About White Lightning Motors — Charlie Stout's Texas Performance Cart Shop](https://whitelightningmotors.com/about/): White Lightning Motors is a small Texas shop run by Charlie Stout. We build high-output golf cart motors and ship them nationwide. 1-year warranty, free return shipping, phone-first support.
- [Reviews — 5.0 Average on Google + Facebook](https://whitelightningmotors.com/reviews/): Every customer review for White Lightning Motors from Google and Facebook — 11 reviews, 5.0 average, including dealer testimonials from Polk County Golf Carts and Tejas Golf Carts.
- [Golf Cart Motor Upgrade FAQ](https://whitelightningmotors.com/faq/): Every common question about White Lightning Motors golf cart upgrades — top speeds, supported carts, lithium, Navitas controllers, AC conversions, warranty, dealer pricing.
